8c4edef93b8c.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
8c4edef93b8c.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
8c4edef93b8c.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

710b85533854.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
710b85533854.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

0ab93f8c6f9b.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
0ab93f8c6f9b.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
0ab93f8c6f9b.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

c68badb2ee1a.title: Ranked #6 of 8 locally — peers are ahead
c68badb2ee1a.description: At percentile 28.6, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.
